channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: Identity Attacks Overtake Exploits as Top Ransomware Cause
item.description: Email attacks overtook exploits as the top ransomware root cause last year. Multifactor authentication (MFA) was deployed in 97% of credential-based attacks but failed to prevent compromise....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Calgary 911 employee charged with breach of trust

item.title: WilmerHale Sued Over Client Personal Information Data Breach

item.title: Files relating to India’s largest nuclear power plant Kudankulam exposed in data breach
item.description: Munsif Vengattil and Aditya Kalra Ransomware group World Leaks has posted on the dark web a huge cache of files related to India’s largest nuclear plant, including purported blueprints of parts of its...
